description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent red gable roof and a large wraparound wooden deck supported by multiple posts. The front entrance is accessed by a set of stairs leading up to a covered porch, flanked by railings. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, with several rectangular windows providing natural light to the interior. The deck extends along the front and side, offering ample outdoor space, and is bordered by a white balustrade. The building is elevated above ground level, suggesting adaptation for uneven terrain or flood-prone areas.
description: A single-story bungalow with a red gable roof, light exterior walls, and a large wraparound wooden deck with railings and stairs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and the expansive deck with stairs and railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end, side windows, and the extension of the deck along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with minimal features and the roof's full span.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and front deck, the porch, and the arrangement of windows and railings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
